👥 User Management
Create and manage system users
➕ Create New User
Loading users...
📱 This Panel
Pick who can log in on this touch panel and who is the default user
Loading panel info…
Panel name
Shown on the login screen ("Who's using the Kitchen Panel?")
Room / location
Optional — used for presence routing
Default user
If set, the panel skips the picker and goes straight to PIN entry for this user
Allowed users
Only these users appear in the picker. Leave all unticked to show everyone.
Loading users…
Allow guest login
Show the Guest tile on this panel's login screen
🎨 Appearance
Theme and display preferences
Theme
Choose light, dark, or follow the time of day
Notifications
Open the Notifications section below to configure which categories alert you and when.
💡 Display
Brightness, night mode, idle dim & screen-off
Enable panel dimming
Lets the Pi panel agent control brightness automatically
Day brightness
Brightness used when the screen is awake during the day — 100%
Night dim schedule
Dim the screen between these hours
Night hours
24h format — start and end of the quiet window
Night brightness
Target brightness at night — 15%
Dim when idle
Lower brightness after no touch for a while
Idle timeout
Seconds of inactivity before dimming — 120s
Idle brightness
Brightness while idle — 30%
Turn screen off when idle
Fully off after a longer idle period
Screen-off timeout
Seconds of inactivity before the screen turns off — 900s
Save & Test
Not saved yet

Home Assistant URL
Your Home Assistant instance URL
Home Assistant Token
Long-lived access token

Default Provider

Audio Quality

Autoplay Recommendations

Listening Stats

📅 Calendar
Views, work hours, and external sync
Default View
Choose your default calendar view
Work Hours
Set your regular work schedule
to
Show All-Day Events
Display all-day events in day view
Show Work Tasks
Display work-related tasks in day view
Show Personal Tasks
Display personal tasks in day view
Time Slot Interval
Interval between time slots (minutes)
Google Calendar Sync
Sync with Google Calendar
Outlook Calendar Sync
Sync with Microsoft Outlook
Calendar Sync Frequency
How often to sync with external calendars
Sync Direction
Choose one-way or bi-directional synchronization
Conflict Policy
How to resolve event updates from multiple systems
Deletion Policy
Choose safe handling for deletes while syncing
Connected Accounts
Google, Outlook, iCloud/CalDAV account links
Sync health loading...

🎓 AI Training
Overnight training and continuous learning
✅ Feedback System Active
Chat feedback buttons (👍 👎 ✏️) are now connected! Your feedback trains Zoe overnight.
Overnight Training
Train Zoe while you sleep (2am - 6am)
Training Time
When to run nightly training
Training Data Today
Examples collected so far
0
0 corrections, 0 positive
Active Configuration
Current model and adapter
llama3.2-1b
No adapter
Recent Training Runs
Last 5 overnight sessions
Loading...
💡 Model Portability
LoRA adapters are model-specific. Switching models requires retraining, but your training DATA is portable and can be reused with any model.
Training Data Management
Export or import training examples
🧠 Intelligence & Proactivity
Proactive suggestions and learning behaviour
Proactive Suggestions
Let Zoe suggest actions based on patterns
Relationship Monitoring
Get reminders when you haven't contacted someone
Task Suggestions
Suggest task breakdowns and schedules
Calendar Insights
Detect patterns and recommend times
Learning
Improve suggestions based on feedback
Zoe Orb
Show Zoe orb and real-time intelligence
Do Not Disturb
Pause proactive suggestions temporarily
